## Why

- New feature requested...

## How to Test
<!-- What commands to run. What output confirms this works. -->
- [ ] Pull this branch: `git pull origin <branch-name>`
- [ ] Activate your environment: `source .venv/Scripts/activate`
- [ ] Run tests: `pytest` or `python -m unittest`
- [ ] Follow scenario steps in the app
- [ ] Confirm expected behavior/output occurs

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No debug code left in
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Verified all steps in "How to Test"
